closures.title: Sprint SPRINT-2026-05-A ends today (2026-05-20) but repo has had zero updates since initial scaffold on 2026-05-15
closures.fix_summary: Reconciled stale SPRINT/ROADMAP/STATUS/CHANGELOG to match git reality (zero non-scaffold commits since 2026-05-15); sprint marked incomplete, no fabricated progress, no sibling-repo backfill.

closures.title: No pre-commit hooks, CODEOWNERS, or GitHub Actions exist despite being referenced as enforced controls
closures.fix_summary: Wired the four missing enforcement primitives — .husky/pre-commit (secret-pattern reject, advisory high-entropy notice), .github/CODEOWNERS (all SECURITY.md Protected Paths + the enforcement files themselves), .github/workflows/protected-paths.yml (label + comment + owner-approval gate), .claude/settings.json (force-push/no-verify/accepted-ADR blockers + PreCommit delegation + Stop reminder); WARNING banners on SECURITY.md and AGENTS.md.
